hero.description: KOTA is an AI voice agent built specifically for restaurants. We handle rush-hour overflow, answer menu questions, and send structured orders to your kitchen.
hero.roiMetric: Stop losing revenue to missed calls and busy signals.

socialProof.title: Trusted by busy restaurants to handle the dinner rush

sampleCall.title: Hear KOTA in Action
sampleCall.description: Listen to a real-world scenario of KOTA navigating a complex lunch order.

signatureDemo.title: From Call to Ticket
signatureDemo.description: Watch a live simulation of KOTA transcribing a customer order and structuring it into a kitchen-ready receipt.

phone.instruction: Click 'Simulate Call' to start the live transcript simulation.

conversation.text: Hi, thanks for calling Korami Sushi. Would you like to place an order or make a reservation?
Hi, yeah, I'd like to place an order for pickup.
Great, I can help with that. What would you like to order?
Can I get two orders of the Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice, and one Dragon Roll?
Two Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice and one Dragon Roll. Got it. Anything else?
Actually, can you make the Dragon Roll with soy paper instead of seaweed? I have a seaweed allergy.
I've noted the seaweed allergy, and I've updated the Dragon Roll to use soy paper. Is there anything else you'd like to add?
No, that's everything. How long will it take?
Your total is $42.50. It will be ready for pickup in about 20 minutes under what name?
Thanks Alex. We'll see you in 20 minutes at Korami Sushi. Goodbye!

problems: Missed calls during rush hour mean lost revenue.
Staff put customers on hold to answer the phone.
Language barriers lead to incorrect orders.
Answering basic menu questions wastes valuable time.
outcomes: Every call in any language is answered instantly.
Orders are structured and sent straight to the kitchen.
Staff stay focused entirely on in-house service.
Menu questions and combos are handled automatically.
problemOutcome.bottomText: Stop treating the phone like an interruption.

howItWorks.title: Built for Restaurant Workflows
howItWorks.subtitle: KOTA handles the phone so your staff can handle the floor.
howItWorks.description: A seamless 4-step process from the customer's voice to your kitchen printer.

steps.title: Customer Calls
steps.description: KOTA answers instantly. No holds, no missed calls, even during Friday night rush.

steps.title: KOTA Handles the Order
steps.description: It naturally guides the customer through your menu, handles modifiers, and answers questions in any language.

steps.title: Order is Confirmed
steps.description: KOTA securely collects details and confirms the final order back to the customer.

steps.title: Ticket Sent to Kitchen
steps.description: The order is structured and instantly sent to your kitchen printer or SMS. Your staff stays focused on service.

howItWorks.setupInstruction: No POS integration. No tablets. We just need your menu.

menuOnboarding.subtitle: Send us your website, Yelp/DoorDash links, PDFs, or menu photos. We structure your items and modifiers so KOTA can start taking live phone orders.

diagram.input: We extract from your website links, DoorDash/Yelp, PDFs, or photos.
diagram.processing1: KOTA maps your items and modifiers.
diagram.output: Your AI is ready to take orders and send tickets to your kitchen.

features.title: AI-Powered Extraction
features.description: We build your menu model directly from platforms or images. No manual entry needed.

features.title: Verified Accuracy
features.description: Our team reviews the AI model to validate complex modifiers. KOTA never guesses.

features.title: Fast Text Updates
features.description: Need to 86 an item? Text our support number and your menu updates fast.

guarantee.title: Go live fast
guarantee.subtitle: From menu handoff to first live call.

useCases.subtitle: Handle every type of call that comes into your restaurant, organized seamlessly.

features.title: Phone Orders
features.description: Captures items, modifiers, and customer info—confirmed via read-back before submission.

features.title: Reservations & Waitlist
features.description: Books reservations and manages waitlist requests dynamically.

features.title: Menu & Allergens Q&A
features.description: Answers complex allergen and ingredient questions instantly based on your custom menu data.

features.title: Hours, Location & Parking
features.description: Stops repetitive logistical calls during rush hour.

features.title: Catering Inquiries
features.description: Collects group sizes, dietary restrictions, and dates, routing them directly to your event manager.

features.title: Order Status & Timing
features.description: Eliminates 'is it ready yet?' calls. Gives real-time status updates based on your prep times.

safety.description: KOTA doesn't guess. Smart guardrails ensure orders are perfectly captured, or instantly escalated to your team.

features.title: Human Fallback
features.description: Handoffs to staff when confidence is low or complex questions arise.

features.title: Full Transparency
features.description: Every call is transcribed and logged. Review exactly what was said.

features.title: Custom Guardrails
features.description: Enforce strict rules. E.g., If an item is 86'd, the agent must offer alternatives from the active menu.

languages.description: KOTA supports multiple languages out of the box, ensuring you never lose an order to a language barrier.
languages.customDesc: We can build support for specific languages upon request.

faq.title: How KOTA Works in Practice
faq.subtitle: We don't promise magic. We promise a reliable operational tool. Here is exactly how KOTA works in practice.

items.question: Does KOTA work with my current menu?
items.answer: Yes. KOTA does not require a complex POS integration. We build your AI directly from your existing online menu, website, or even photos of your printed menu. If you have complex modifiers or combos, our team manually verifies the logic before you go live.

items.question: How do orders get sent to my staff?
items.answer: Orders are instantly structured and pushed to a Wi-Fi enabled Cloud Printer in your kitchen. Alternatively, we can route orders directly to a manager's phone via SMS or a tablet. Your staff never has to transcribe a voice order again.

items.question: Can it answer common questions about our restaurant?
items.answer: Absolutely. During onboarding, we ingest your operating hours, parking situation, allergy protocols, and common FAQs. KOTA handles the repetitive questions so your staff doesn't have to.

items.question: What happens if a customer asks something KOTA doesn't know?
items.answer: KOTA is built with strict boundary rails. If a customer asks an overly complex question, has a severe allergy concern, or requests something off-menu, KOTA will politely state it cannot help and can immediately transfer the call to your human staff.

items.question: What cuisines or restaurant types are a good fit?
items.answer: Our current pilot focus is on high-volume takeout/delivery businesses where missed calls equal lost revenue—especially Pizza, Sushi, Thai, Chinese, and busy fast-casual concepts.
